hero.title: folio
hero.name: Donatas Paulauskas
hero.description: I turn business requirements into data-driven solutions through analytics and KPI design. My goal is to transform complex data into clear, actionable insights.

services.title: Data Analytics & Expertise
services.subtitle: Turning complex data into clear, actionable business insights
services.intro: I design structured analytical solutions that support decision-making, performance tracking, and operational optimization.
services.automationDesc: Designing interactive Power BI dashboards with structured data models, DAX measures, and KPI.
services.marketingDesc: Writing advanced SQL queries (joins, CTEs, aggregations) to extract, transform, and structure raw data.
services.webDevDesc: Defining performance indicators aligned with business goals and building reporting frameworks for revenue, margin, growth, and operational metrics.
services.crmDesc: Analyzing operational workflows to identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and performance gaps using data-backed evaluation.
services.integrationDesc: Preparing structured datasets through data cleaning, normalization, and star-schema modeling for scalable BI solutions.
services.dataAnalysisDesc: Automating reporting, data processing, and repetitive workflows using Python (Pandas, scripting, integrations).

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Projects I deliver are designed to be practical and efficient.

skills.title: Analytics & Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: Business Intelligence & Data Engineering Foundations
skills.powerbiDesc: Dashboard development using DAX, calculated measures, data modeling, and interactive KPI reporting.
skills.kpiReportingDesc: Designing performance metrics aligned with business goals, tracking revenue, margin, growth, and operational efficiency.
skills.dataModelingDesc: Building structured datasets using star schema principles, relationship management, and dimensional modeling.
skills.businessAnalysisDesc: Evaluating workflows, identifying inefficiencies, and translating business requirements into analytical solutions.
skills.sqlDesc: Advanced querying using JOINs, CTEs, aggregations, and window functions to extract and structure relational data.
skills.pythonDesc: Data cleaning and transformation using Pandas, basic automation scripting, and structured dataset preparation.
skills.dataTransformationDesc: ETL logic, data normalization, and preparing raw data for BI reporting and performance analysis.
skills.automationDesc: Workflow scripting and system integration with make.com to reduce repetitive manual operations.

about.title: Business-Focused Data Analyst
about.description1: Entry-level Data Analyst with a background in International Business and hands-on experience in SQL, Power BI, and Python. I focus on translating business requirements into structured analytical solutions.
about.description2: My work centers on KPI reporting, data modeling, and performance analysis — turning operational and financial data into clear insights that support strategic decision-making.

resume.title: Resume
resume.subtitle: I'm building my career in data analytics, focusing on KPI reporting, structured data modeling, and business performance analysis. My goal is to support strategic decision-making through clear, data-driven insights.
resume.summaryText: Entry-level Data Analyst with a background in International Business and hands-on experience in SQL, Power BI, and Python. Experienced in KPI reporting, performance analysis, and translating business requirements into structured analytical insights.
resume.job1Task1: Conducted market, competitor, and pricing analysis to support expansion strategy.
resume.job1Task2: Evaluated regulatory and financial data for data-driven decision-making.
resume.job1Task3: Presented analytical insights and strategic recommendations to stakeholders.
resume.job2Task1: Analyzed campaign and sales performance data to evaluate effectiveness.
resume.job2Task2: Optimized CRM workflows to improve reporting accuracy and data visibility.
resume.job2Task3: Supported KPI tracking and operational performance reporting.
resume.edu1Description: Specialization in consulting and business growth strategies.
resume.edu2Description: Power BI, DAX, SQL queries, Python, Pandas.

t1.text: Identified seasonal delay peaks and high-risk airports by analyzing 5.8M flight records, uncovering structural operational bottlenecks.

t2.text: Analyzed multi-year sales growth (25% YoY) while identifying stable ~5% margins, confirming scalable revenue expansion.

t3.text: Automated appointment reminders saved 15+ hours per week and increased response rates by 35% through intelligent follow-up timing.

t4.text: Eliminated 25+ hours of weekly manual data entry by synchronizing CRM, email, and forms - improving lead tracking and sales focus.

t5.text: Automated scheduling and follow-up workflows increased meeting efficiency while eliminating manual coordination overhead.

t6.text: Leveraged Claude, GitHub Copilot, and ChatGPT to architect and deploy a production-ready website using AI-assisted development workflows.

websiteBuild.overview1: A professional website solution tailored to specific business needs. Every site follows SEO and SEM best practices to be discoverable and attract more visitors.
websiteBuild.overview2: Pages are interactive with the right forms and automations to optimize customer experience and streamline business processes.
websiteBuild.feature1Desc: Built to your requirements so the site matches your business needs and strategy
websiteBuild.feature2Desc: Pages are optimized for search engines to increase visibility and traffic
websiteBuild.feature3Desc: Modern, usable, and visually appealing across devices
websiteBuild.feature4Desc: Forms, bookings, and other flows that automate customer service
websiteBuild.heroSub: SEO-optimized, modular websites with automated forms and easy content management
websiteBuild.problemWhat: Many businesses lacked a modern, optimized website, resulting in poor online presence and lost opportunities. Manual updates and lack of automation slowed growth.
websiteBuild.problemWho: Small business owners and individuals who needed a professional web presence but lacked technical resources.
websiteBuild.problemRisk: Outdated or missing websites led to lost customers, lower search rankings, and reduced credibility.
websiteBuild.analysisApproach: Analyzed business needs, researched best web practices, and designed a modular, SEO-friendly website template for rapid deployment.
websiteBuild.analysisFinding1: SEO and SEM are critical for visibility
websiteBuild.solutionDesigned: Built a professional, SEO-optimized website template with interactive features, automated forms, and easy content management.
websiteBuild.workflowStep3Text: Implement best practices for search visibility
websiteBuild.workflowStep4Text: Deploy site and automate key processes
websiteBuild.solutionWhy: A modern, automated website increases business credibility, attracts more customers, and reduces manual work for owners.

autoEmails.heroSub: Intelligent follow-up system that boosts appointment attendance
autoEmails.overview1: A sophisticated email automation system designed to reduce no-shows and improve patient engagement. Smart reminders sent at optimal times increase appointment attendance and reduce administrative burden.
autoEmails.overview2: The system integrates seamlessly with existing patient databases and scheduling tools, automatically triggering personalized reminders based on appointment proximity and patient communication preferences.
autoEmails.feature1Desc: Smart algorithms determine the optimal time to send reminders for maximum effectiveness
autoEmails.feature2Desc: Messages tailored to patient preferences and appointment details
autoEmails.feature3Desc: Works with existing patient management systems without disrupting workflows
autoEmails.feature4Desc: Track open rates, click-throughs, and appointment attendance impact
autoEmails.problemWhat: The dental practice experienced high no-show rates, costing time and revenue. Manual reminder calls were labor-intensive and inconsistent.
autoEmails.problemWho: Dental staff struggling with patient reminders, and patients missing appointments due to forgetfulness.
autoEmails.problemRisk: High no-show rates reduced revenue, wasted scheduling capacity, and increased administrative workload.
autoEmails.analysisApproach: Studied patient behavior patterns, identified optimal reminder timing, and designed an automation workflow using Make.com integration with their patient management system.
autoEmails.analysisFinding1: Email reminders are most effective 24 hours before appointments
autoEmails.analysisFinding3: Automated systems reduce staff workload significantly
autoEmails.solutionDesigned: Built a fully automated reminder system that triggers personalized emails based on appointment schedules, with optional SMS backups and built-in analytics dashboard.
autoEmails.workflowStep1Text: System monitors new appointments in the patient management system
autoEmails.workflowStep2Text: Calculate optimal reminder time based on appointment date
autoEmails.workflowStep3Text: Pull patient data and customize reminder content
autoEmails.workflowStep4Text: Deliver reminder and track engagement metrics
autoEmails.solutionWhy: Automated reminders increase appointment attendance, reduce no-shows, lower administrative burden, and improve patient satisfaction.
autoEmails.resultTime: Per-video post production reduced from 45 min to 5 min
autoEmails.resultConsistency: Automated posting ensures no missed uploads
autoEmails.resultQuality: Optimized captions and hashtags increase engagement
autoEmails.resultReach: One workflow, multiple platforms updated simultaneously

videoGenerator.heroSub: Delay KPIs, airport congestion, carrier performance, and seasonality across 5.8M+ flights
videoGenerator.overview1: Built a multi-page Power BI report analyzing 5.8M+ US flight records to track on-time performance, delay patterns, and operational bottlenecks across airports and carriers.
videoGenerator.overview2: The dashboard supports drilldowns by carrier, airport, route, month/season, and delay reason to identify where performance breaks and what drives delays.
videoGenerator.feature1Desc: On-time rate, avg delay minutes, cancellation/diversion rates with trend tracking
videoGenerator.feature2Desc: Rank airports by delay impact, volume, and peak-time congestion patterns
videoGenerator.feature3Desc: Compare carriers and routes to surface underperformance and variance drivers
videoGenerator.feature4Desc: Monthly patterns and breakdown by delay reason (weather, NAS, carrier, late aircraft)
videoGenerator.problemWhat: Flight performance data was too large and fragmented to quickly answer basic operational questions: which airports are the biggest delay contributors, which carriers underperform, and how seasonality changes delay patterns.
videoGenerator.problemWho: Operations and planning stakeholders who need reliable KPIs for staffing, scheduling, and performance monitoring across airports and carriers.
videoGenerator.problemRisk: Without clear delay drivers, decisions become reactive: inefficient scheduling, higher operational costs, poor passenger experience, and missed opportunities to reduce delay minutes.
videoGenerator.analysisApproach: Cleaned and modeled flight records into an analytics-friendly structure, created KPI measures (on-time %, delay mins, cancellation rate), and built drilldowns to isolate delay contributors by airport, carrier, route, and season.
videoGenerator.analysisFinding1: A small set of high-volume airports contributes disproportionally to total delay minutes
videoGenerator.analysisFinding2: Carrier performance varies by season and specific hubs, not only overall averages
videoGenerator.analysisFinding3: Late aircraft and NAS-related delays drive repeat delay patterns across peak periods
videoGenerator.analysisFinding4: Certain routes show persistent underperformance, suggesting structural issues (turnaround time, scheduling)
videoGenerator.solutionDesigned: Developed a Power BI report with KPI overview, airport congestion analysis, carrier comparisons, and seasonality views — enabling fast drilldowns from headline KPIs to root causes.
videoGenerator.workflowStep1Text: Validate flight records, standardize dates, handle missing values, define delay logic
videoGenerator.workflowStep2Text: Star-schema style model + DAX measures for KPIs and time intelligence
videoGenerator.workflowStep3Text: Pages for overview KPIs, airports, carriers/routes, and delay reason analysis
videoGenerator.workflowStep4Text: Identify top delay contributors and track trends for targeted operational improvements
videoGenerator.solutionWhy: Transforms raw flight records into decision-ready KPIs — allowing stakeholders to prioritize the airports, carriers, routes, and seasons with the highest delay impact.
videoGenerator.resultTime: From manual slicing to instant drilldowns by airport/carrier/season
videoGenerator.resultOutput: Large-scale performance monitoring with consistent KPI definitions
videoGenerator.resultQuality: Delay drivers and bottlenecks made visible (reason + location)
videoGenerator.resultReuse: Template can be reused for other operational KPI datasets

artifacts.makeScenario: Power BI report (multi-page) with KPI and drilldown analysis

artifacts.userGuide: How to use filters, drilldowns, and interpret delay drivers
artifacts.videoTemplates: Reusable dashboard structure for operational KPI reporting

testimonialGenerator.heroSub: Revenue, product performance, customer segmentation, and retention analysis using SQL only
testimonialGenerator.overview1: Performed end-to-end sales and customer analysis using a public online retail dataset. Focused on revenue trends, product concentration, repeat purchase behavior, and customer segmentation.
testimonialGenerator.overview2: All analysis was done using SQL only — including data cleaning, KPI calculation, RFM segmentation, and cohort-style retention tracking.
testimonialGenerator.feature1Desc: Total revenue, orders, AOV, gross profit, margin %, MoM growth
testimonialGenerator.feature2Desc: Top products, category contribution, Pareto revenue distribution
testimonialGenerator.feature3Desc: Recency, Frequency, Monetary scoring to identify top customers
testimonialGenerator.feature4Desc: Customer repeat rate and monthly retention trends
testimonialGenerator.problemWhat: Raw transactional data does not provide clear insight into revenue drivers, customer value, or product concentration. Stakeholders cannot easily identify growth opportunities or risks.
testimonialGenerator.problemWho: E-commerce managers and marketing teams needing better visibility into performance and customer behavior.
testimonialGenerator.problemRisk: Over-reliance on revenue alone hides margin leakage, over-dependence on a small set of products, and low retention from new customers.
testimonialGenerator.analysisApproach: Cleaned transaction-level data, removed cancellations, created revenue and margin calculations, and built analytical queries using JOINs, CTEs, window functions, and date functions.
testimonialGenerator.analysisFinding1: Top 10% of products generated ~48% of total revenue (high concentration)
testimonialGenerator.analysisFinding2: Returning customers represented 32% of customers but 58% of revenue
testimonialGenerator.analysisFinding3: Average Order Value increased 18% during Q4 seasonal peaks
testimonialGenerator.analysisFinding4: Customer retention drops significantly after first purchase without remarketing
testimonialGenerator.solutionDesigned: Developed structured SQL scripts to calculate KPIs, rank products, segment customers using RFM logic, and measure monthly retention rates.
testimonialGenerator.workflowStep1Text: Removed cancelled orders, handled null values, standardized date fields
testimonialGenerator.workflowStep2Text: Revenue, profit, AOV, margin %, MoM growth using CTEs
testimonialGenerator.workflowStep3Text: Built RFM scoring model using window functions
testimonialGenerator.workflowStep4Text: Tracked repeat purchase behavior and monthly customer cohorts
testimonialGenerator.solutionWhy: Transforms raw sales data into structured, decision-ready insights that highlight profitability drivers, customer value, and growth opportunities.
testimonialGenerator.resultTime: Cleaned and modeled full dataset using SQL
testimonialGenerator.resultFreshness: Revenue tracked by product, category, and customer segment
testimonialGenerator.resultConsistency: Identified high-value customers contributing majority of profit
testimonialGenerator.resultTrust: Clear drop-off after first purchase highlights remarketing opportunity

artifacts.userGuide: README explaining queries and business logic
artifacts.templates: Reusable KPI and RFM query templates

autoCRM.heroSub: Smart system that keeps customer data synchronized across tools and triggers timely follow-ups
autoCRM.overview1: A comprehensive CRM automation system that seamlessly synchronizes customer data across multiple platforms, tracks interactions, and triggers intelligent follow-up workflows.
autoCRM.overview2: The system ensures no lead falls through the cracks by automating data entry, synchronization, lead scoring, and follow-up communications.
autoCRM.feature1Desc: Keeps customer data synchronized across email, forms, and CRM tools
autoCRM.feature2Desc: Intelligent system prioritizes leads based on engagement and fit
autoCRM.feature3Desc: Triggered communications based on customer actions and engagement level
autoCRM.feature4Desc: Complete visibility into all customer interactions across channels
autoCRM.problemWhat: Sales team juggled multiple tools with no data synchronization. Customer information fragmented, follow-ups missed, opportunities lost. Manual data entry consumed hours daily.
autoCRM.problemWho: Sales and marketing teams frustrated by data silos, CRM managers overwhelmed by manual synchronization.
autoCRM.problemRisk: Lost leads, missed opportunities, sales team inefficiency, incomplete customer understanding.
autoCRM.analysisApproach: Analyzed sales process, identified data silos, and designed system integrating CRM, email, forms, and communication tools with intelligent automation.
autoCRM.analysisFinding1: Data fragmentation causes 30% of lost opportunities
autoCRM.analysisFinding3: Real-time synchronization improves sales cycle speed
autoCRM.analysisFinding4: Lead scoring based on engagement improves conversion rates
autoCRM.solutionDesigned: Built integrated system syncing email, forms, meetings, and CRM platform. Automates lead capture, scoring, and multi-channel follow-up workflows.
autoCRM.workflowStep1Text: Automatically collect leads from forms, email, and meetings
autoCRM.workflowStep2Text: Sync information across all business tools in real-time
autoCRM.workflowStep3Text: Evaluate leads based on engagement and fit criteria
autoCRM.workflowStep4Text: Trigger timely outreach based on lead status and actions
autoCRM.solutionWhy: Eliminates data silos, automates repetitive tasks, ensures consistent follow-up, and accelerates sales cycle.
autoCRM.resultTime: Manual reporting and data entry reduced by 80%
autoCRM.resultEfficiency: Staff can focus on value-added tasks
autoCRM.resultImpact: CRM supports business growth and expansion

autoCaptions.heroSub: Power BI dashboard for revenue, margin, customer segments, and trend drivers
autoCaptions.overview1: Built an end-to-end sales and profitability dashboard to track revenue, gross margin, order volume, and performance by product, customer, and region.
autoCaptions.overview2: The report supports drilldowns from total performance to the drivers behind change: top products, customer concentration, seasonal patterns, and margin leakage.
autoCaptions.feature1Desc: Revenue, gross profit, margin %, units, orders, AOV with time intelligence
autoCaptions.feature2Desc: Top/bottom products, key accounts, and concentration risk by segment
autoCaptions.feature3Desc: Monthly trends, YoY comparisons, and peaks by category and region
autoCaptions.feature4Desc: Identify margin leakage via discounting, cost changes, and product mix
autoCaptions.problemWhat: Sales reporting was fragmented and focused mainly on revenue, making it hard to explain performance changes, profitability drivers, and which products or customers were actually driving results.
autoCaptions.problemWho: Commercial and management teams needed a single source of truth for performance tracking, forecasting conversations, and decision-making across product, customer, and region.
autoCaptions.problemRisk: Decisions based only on revenue can hide margin erosion, customer concentration, and unprofitable growth, leading to weaker profitability and missed improvement opportunities.
autoCaptions.analysisApproach: Modeled the dataset into a clean star schema, validated KPIs, and created measures for revenue, cost, profit, margin %, and time intelligence. Built visuals to reveal drivers by product, customer, geography, and time.
autoCaptions.analysisFinding1: A small set of products contributes the majority of revenue (concentration effect)
autoCaptions.analysisFinding2: Profitability varies significantly by product mix and customer segment
autoCaptions.analysisFinding3: Seasonality impacts sales volume, but margin trends can move differently
autoCaptions.analysisFinding4: Discounting and cost changes are key drivers of margin leakage
autoCaptions.solutionDesigned: Designed an interactive Power BI report with KPI overview, product performance, customer/regional segmentation, and profitability drilldowns to support business-first decisions.
autoCaptions.workflowStep1Text: Clean and validate sales, cost, and customer fields; standardize dates and categories
autoCaptions.workflowStep2Text: Star schema + DAX measures for KPIs, margin %, and time intelligence
autoCaptions.workflowStep3Text: Pages for overview, product analysis, customer/region analysis, and profitability drivers
autoCaptions.workflowStep4Text: Highlight top drivers, risks, and opportunities with drilldowns and tooltips
autoCaptions.solutionWhy: This setup turns raw transactions into a decision tool: it explains the "why" behind performance changes and supports actions like focusing on high-margin products, managing concentration risk, and improving pricing discipline.
autoCaptions.resultTime: Replaced manual summaries with interactive drilldowns
autoCaptions.resultQuality: Margins and profit drivers visible by product, customer, and region
autoCaptions.resultConsistency: Consistent KPIs and definitions across stakeholders
autoCaptions.resultReach: Trend, segmentation, and profitability views in one report
autoCaptions.deliverable1: Power BI report (multi-page) with KPI and drilldown analysis
autoCaptions.deliverable3: Insight summary: key drivers, risks, and improvement opportunities
autoCaptions.deliverable4: Reusable KPI definitions (revenue, margin, profit, AOV, YoY)

zoomMeetingGenerator.heroSub: Turn recordings into transcripts, coaching insights, and follow-up actions — automatically
zoomMeetingGenerator.overview1: Sales reps spent a lot of time on Zoom and phone calls, but call quality was hard to measure and coaching feedback was inconsistent. Managers lacked visibility into what went well, what went wrong, and what opportunities were missed.
zoomMeetingGenerator.overview2: This automation ingests call recordings, transcribes speech to text, analyzes the conversation with GPT, and outputs structured summaries, coaching notes, objections, missed opportunities, and next-step recommendations — delivered to the team automatically.
zoomMeetingGenerator.feature1Desc: Recordings converted to searchable text with timestamps
zoomMeetingGenerator.feature2Desc: What went well, what to improve, and coaching points per rep
zoomMeetingGenerator.feature3Desc: Flags weak discovery, missing questions, and unhandled objections
zoomMeetingGenerator.feature4Desc: Next steps + email draft + CRM notes generated from the transcript
zoomMeetingGenerator.problemWhat: Calls were happening daily, but feedback loops were weak. Reps didn't get consistent coaching, managers couldn't review everything, and high-value details were lost after calls.
zoomMeetingGenerator.problemWho: Sales reps who needed faster improvement, and managers who needed visibility into performance and deal risks.
zoomMeetingGenerator.problemRisk: Inconsistent call quality, missed buying signals, poor follow-up discipline, and slower ramp-up for new reps — directly impacting conversion rates.
zoomMeetingGenerator.analysisApproach: Mapped the call workflow end-to-end: capture → storage → transcription → analysis → delivery. Defined a consistent output template (summary, objections, next steps, coaching feedback) and added basic scoring signals for performance tracking.
zoomMeetingGenerator.analysisFinding1: Managers couldn't review more than ~10–15% of calls manually
zoomMeetingGenerator.analysisFinding2: Most deals lost key context because notes were incomplete or delayed
zoomMeetingGenerator.analysisFinding3: Discovery quality varied heavily between reps (inconsistent questioning)
zoomMeetingGenerator.analysisFinding4: Structured follow-ups were the biggest controllable improvement lever
zoomMeetingGenerator.solutionDesigned: Built an automated call intelligence pipeline: collect recordings → transcribe with AssemblyAI → enrich transcript with GPT → generate structured outputs (summary, coaching, missed opportunities, action items) → push results to a shared workspace/CRM and notify the team.
zoomMeetingGenerator.workflowStep1Text: Zoom/phone recordings are collected and stored centrally
zoomMeetingGenerator.workflowStep2Text: AssemblyAI transcribes audio to timestamped text
zoomMeetingGenerator.workflowStep3Text: GPT creates summary, coaching feedback, objections, risks, and next steps
zoomMeetingGenerator.workflowStep4Text: Outputs delivered to reps/managers and logged for performance review
zoomMeetingGenerator.solutionWhy: It creates a consistent coaching loop at scale. Reps get actionable feedback fast, managers get visibility without listening to every call, and follow-ups become more structured and reliable.
zoomMeetingGenerator.resultFeedback: Less manual note-taking and post-call summaries per rep
zoomMeetingGenerator.resultRevenue: More consistent next steps, clearer action items, better email follow-ups
zoomMeetingGenerator.resultTime: New reps improved faster with consistent call feedback templates
zoomMeetingGenerator.resultClose: Improved discovery + objection handling increased win rate in tracked deals
zoomMeetingGenerator.toolZoomDesc: Zoom cloud recordings (or phone call recordings) ingestion
zoomMeetingGenerator.toolAiDesc: ChatGPT (OpenAI) - summaries, coaching feedback, and opportunity detection
zoomMeetingGenerator.deliverable1: Make.com scenario: recording ingestion → transcription → analysis → delivery
zoomMeetingGenerator.deliverable2: Standardized output template: summary, risks, objections, next steps, coaching notes
zoomMeetingGenerator.deliverable3: Manager-ready call report format + weekly performance digest
zoomMeetingGenerator.deliverable4: Optional CRM notes + follow-up email draft generation
